allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; routes = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['paths']; [print\(r\) for r in routes]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); info=d.get\('playerInfo',{}\); keys=[k for k in info.keys\(\) if k not in \('showAvatarInfoList','showNameCardIdList'\)]; [print\(k,'=',info[k]\) for k in keys]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('achievements:', d.get\('achievements'\)\); print\('spiral_abyss:', d.get\('spiral_abyss'\)\); print\('imaginarium_theater:', d.get\('imaginarium_theater'\)\); print\('stygian_onslaught:', d.get\('stygian_onslaught'\)\)")
